{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321212232EBD44C393D6DEA54DBDB"}"},"total":992},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7583155816695350078","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，作者不要怀疑，作为一个十五年老书迷，我觉得你的内容比现在大部分人都要新颖，文笔也很流畅，加油，不要灰心，随心就好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765593665,"group_id":"7572414859212508184","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9uDRBgBjIsbekRbUMH6v/ohq1UAeuf+mCd3GU/01dy+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4375660903280270","user_name":"爱吃肉焖的一松"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4375660903280270","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7572414859212508184","book_info":{"abstract":"【凡人流+群像+无系统】
【简介一】
高三11班的同学们学习成绩并不理想，毕业晚宴上，语文老师兼班主任宋成民举杯。
宋成民：我早在30年前，就下定决心退休后去一个地方，一去不回那种；那个地方有人，有妖，有魔，有仙；你们学习太差，与其上野鸡大学，不如跟我一起去闯荡，你们有谁愿意与我一同前往？
语文课代表王奇文分析道：宋老师的意思是说我们要去混社会，而社会上的人形形色色，是妖魔鬼怪。
差生班众人纷纷举杯答应前往。
一杯酒下肚，众人昏睡。
……
酒醒之后，众人发现已经群穿仙侠世界！
宋成民：好了，大家依次排好队，准备测试灵根！
众人：不是，宋老师，你来真的啊！

【简介二】
辍学少年齐凡身负奇特饿病，一次高中毕业典礼聚会，跟同学们一起被班主任宋成民带入修仙界，从此开启波澜壮阔的一生……
而同学们也在这个修仙世界挣扎求生，以凡人之躯，一代一代前赴后继，追逐仙道。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/77396ab76f3167c7061ccc5f34c61bd2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"浮夸十年","author_id":"","book_id":"7572414859212508184","book_name":"同学群穿仙侠，从挖矿武者开始","book_short_name":"万仙志","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7572416675627139646","read_count":"105483","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"611741"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"286","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,奇幻仙侠,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/606a86c2c35bcbc421a0b9fcaf786c1c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283352&x-signature=xxUjc3u99mp7PLz6Ei2VrRtA1HI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100974182266","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321212232EBD44C393D6DEA54DBDB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4655,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16634,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":22122},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591753537187234585","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常精彩，停不下来，熬了个通宵读完的[赞]
是我心中的仙品，剧情非常跌宕起伏，难以预料，但又合情合理，非常过瘾[雀食神作]
作者非常擅长人物心理描写，各个同学之间的小心思描写得活灵活现，非常真实[我也强推]
修仙土著和地球同学间穿插出现，确实让整个故事都变得悬念十足！超级期待每一次老同学们的登场！十年之约！！！[已种草]
故事整体像是遮天➕凡人修仙传优点的结合，主角齐凡性格很像叶凡，恩怨分明，有恩报恩，有仇报仇，同时像叶凡一样专注修炼一百年不动摇，对于女色毫无波澜[笑哭] 
同时又像韩天尊一样稳重谨慎，各种细节很到位，偶有挫折也能够不断反思进步[赞]
最后能感觉这个故事会是超长篇，但看得人不多，担心作者没有动力写下去，唉，我也完全认同作者抒发的感慨，良作无人[伤心]
希望会有更多流量，越来越好[求爆更]","text_exts":[{"e":289,"s":286,"text":"故事会","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%E4%BC%9A&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774099352EA54DBDB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227591753537187234585%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227572414859212508184%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%E4%BC%9A%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767596778,"group_id":"7572414859212508184","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+IEDFWHDHyXkaD6x/I1qCjlGxwSJ6b0WpwiLjx2gWLx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3947689547925033","user_name":"数以百计的炎炽凤羽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3947689547925033","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7572414859212508184","book_info":{"abstract":"【凡人流+群像+无系统】
